perturbation.original_text: Display materials from the Sponsor must be delivered to the Tian He Stadium at least two days prior to the event.
perturbation.changed_text: Display materials from the Sponsor must be delivered to the Tian He Stadium at least seven days prior to the event.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by modifying the delivery deadline for display materials from two days to seven days prior to the event. This affects logistical planning and creates uncertainty about the required lead time. This introduces an in-text contradiction by setting up a different deadline from what was first presented.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This is understood between the parties that SLD may resale all or some of the above sponsorship components to other buyers, provided that SLD shall submit third party display materials at least five days prior to the event for ACM's approval.
perturbation.justification: The changed text alters the delivery deadline for the Sponsor's display materials from 'at least two days prior to the event' to 'at least seven days prior to the event'. The contradicted text states that SLD must submit third party display materials at least 'five days prior to the event'. This creates a contradiction because the Sponsor now has a different required lead time (seven days) than what's required of SLD for third-party materials (five days), which makes it unclear which deadline applies to display materials in general and constitutes an inconsistency as defined in the instructions.
